function: async () => { const out = {}; const fi = document.getElementById('modalRefUpload'); if (!fi) return { err: 'no file input' }; const b64 = 'iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVR42mNkYPhfDwAChwGA60e6kgAAAABJRU5ErkJggg=='; const bin = atob(b64); const arr = new Uint8Array(bin.length); for (let i = 0; i < bin.length; i++) arr[i] = bin.charCodeAt(i); const file = new File([arr], 'test.png', { type: 'image/png' }); const dt = new DataTransfer(); dt.items.add(file); fi.files = dt.files; fi.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); out.previewVisible = !document.getElementById('modalRefPreview').classList.contains('hidden'); out.previewSrcStart = document.getElementById('modalRefPreview').src.substring(0, 40); return out; }
